### Top Section:
- **Title**: Depth-first search (DFS)
- **Description**: Recursively explore graph, backtracking as necessary, careful not to repeat.
- **Algorithm**: DFS-Visit(V, Adj[s])
  - **Parameters**: V (vertex), Adj[s] (adjacent vertices)
